Form input (text) has no accessible label

SERIOUS

Input uses placeholder as only label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a visibleelement - placeholders disappear when typing

CRITICAL

SERIOUS

Input uses placeholder as only label

MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a aria-label="Twitter" class="toollink shareonlink twitter" href="#" onclick="return twitThisTwo(document.title, '', location.href, 3);">
Useelement for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a aria-label="Tips en venn" class="toollink tipslink tipslinkicon" href="#" onclick="location.href='/ortopedisk-poliklinikk.614721.no.html?showtipform=2#tips'; return false;" title="Tips en venn">
Useelement for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a aria-label="Skriv ut" class="toollink printlink printlinkicon" href="#" onclick="window.print(); return false;" rel="nofollow" title="Skriv ut">
Useelement for interactive controls, or add role='button'

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

MODERATE

3.3.2 Labels or Instructions (4 avvik)2 kritisk2 alvorlig
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input (text) has no accessible label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add aelement with 'for' attribute, or use aria-label
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Input uses placeholder as only label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a visibleelement - placeholders disappear when typing
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input (text) has no accessible label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Nåh, ka vi kan hjelpe deg med?" type="text" value=""/>
Add aelement with 'for' attribute, or use aria-label
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Input uses placeholder as only label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Nåh, ka vi kan hjelpe deg med?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a visibleelement - placeholders disappear when typing
1.3.5 Identify Input Purpose (1 avvik)1 mindre
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MINOR

Input appears to be for 'search' but lacks autocomplete

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add appropriate autocomplete attribute for search fields

3.3.2 Labels or Instructions (4 avvik)2 kritisk2 alvorlig
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input (text) has no accessible label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add aelement with 'for' attribute, or use aria-label
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Input uses placeholder as only label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a visibleelement - placeholders disappear when typing
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input (text) has no accessible label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Nåh, ka vi kan hjelpe deg med?" type="text" value=""/>
Add aelement with 'for' attribute, or use aria-label
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Input uses placeholder as only label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Nåh, ka vi kan hjelpe deg med?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a visibleelement - placeholders disappear when typing
1.3.5 Identify Input Purpose (1 avvik)1 mindre
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MINOR

Input appears to be for 'search' but lacks autocomplete

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add appropriate autocomplete attribute for search fields

3.3.2 Labels or Instructions (4 avvik)2 kritisk2 alvorlig
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input (text) has no accessible label

Add aelement with 'for' attribute, or use aria-label
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Input uses placeholder as only label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a visibleelement - placeholders disappear when typing
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input (text) has no accessible label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Nåh, ka vi kan hjelpe deg med?" type="text" value=""/>
Add aelement with 'for' attribute, or use aria-label
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Input uses placeholder as only label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Nåh, ka vi kan hjelpe deg med?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a visibleelement - placeholders disappear when typing
1.3.5 Identify Input Purpose (1 avvik)1 mindre
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MINOR

Input appears to be for 'search' but lacks autocomplete

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add appropriate autocomplete attribute for search fields

Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input (text) has no accessible label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add aelement with 'for' attribute, or use aria-label
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Input uses placeholder as only label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a visibleelement - placeholders disappear when typing
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input (text) has no accessible label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Nåh, ka vi kan hjelpe deg med?" type="text" value=""/>
Add aelement with 'for' attribute, or use aria-label
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Input uses placeholder as only label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Nåh, ka vi kan hjelpe deg med?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a visibleelement - placeholders disappear when typing

Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MINOR

Input appears to be for 'search' but lacks autocomplete

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add appropriate autocomplete attribute for search fields

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a aria-label="Twitter" class="toollink shareonlink twitter" href="#" onclick="return twitThisTwo(document.title, '', location.href, 3);">
Useelement for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a aria-label="Tips en venn" class="toollink tipslink tipslinkicon" href="#" onclick="location.href='/roentgen.550556.no.html?showtipform=2#tips'; return false;" title="Tips en venn">
Useelement for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a aria-label="Skriv ut" class="toollink printlink printlinkicon" href="#" onclick="window.print(); return false;" rel="nofollow" title="Skriv ut">
Useelement for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menuitem menulevel2 newwindow" data-cat="509911" href="/e-dialog.509911.no.html" id="footermenutwoamenuitem509911" target="_blank">E-dialog</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

3.3.2 Labels or Instructions (4 avvik)2 kritisk2 alvorlig
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input (text) has no accessible label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add aelement with 'for' attribute, or use aria-label
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Input uses placeholder as only label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a visibleelement - placeholders disappear when typing
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input (text) has no accessible label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Nåh, ka vi kan hjelpe deg med?" type="text" value=""/>
Add aelement with 'for' attribute, or use aria-label
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Input uses placeholder as only label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Nåh, ka vi kan hjelpe deg med?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a visibleelement - placeholders disappear when typing
1.3.5 Identify Input Purpose (1 avvik)1 mindre
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MINOR

Input appears to be for 'search' but lacks autocomplete

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add appropriate autocomplete attribute for search fields
